prompts: Cinematic anime realism, luxury cruise engine room with warm warning lights and rain reflections on metal surfaces. Kai Harbor, an androgynous passenger in elegant storm-night evening wear, holds a heavy metal panel steady. Kai Reed, a masculine cruise chef in a white jacket with rolled sleeves, uses a repair tool on the machinery. Cooperative maintenance action, no sparks, no injury, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous engine room shot, cinematic anime realism. Kai Reed completes the safe adjustment to the panel while Kai Harbor maintains a steady grip. The flickering warning lights stabilize into steady warm light. The storm continues outside the porthole, rain streaks visible. No text, no watermark, consistent character appearance and lighting.
